HomePage.heroSubtitle: Book doctors, lab tests, and medicines easily from the comfort of your home. Everything you need, right when you need it.
HomePage.comprehensiveDesc: Everything you need to manage your health seamlessly in one app.
HomePage.serviceDocDesc: Find top doctors across specialties and book video or in-person visits instantly.
HomePage.serviceLabDesc: Book lab tests at home. Safe, hygienic, and quick reporting straight to your app.
HomePage.serviceMedDesc: Upload your prescription and get medicines delivered right to your doorstep.
HomePage.step1Desc: Select what you need: a doctor, a test, or medical supplies.
HomePage.step2Desc: Fill out a simple form, pick a slot, and confirm securely.
HomePage.step3Desc: Receive expert care at home or at the clinic without wait times.
HomePage.emergencyDesc: Our emergency support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
